Comprehensive Retirement Planning Services

Everything you need to create, implement, and maintain a successful retirement strategy.

Our Core Services

We specialize in retirement income planning and tax optimization for families with $500K+ in retirement savings.

Tax-Efficient Retirement Strategies

Minimize taxes in retirement with strategic planning and optimization.

Learn More

Comprehensive Portfolio Management

Professional investment management aligned with your retirement goals.

Learn More

Personalized Retirement Money Map

Our proprietary planning tool creates your personalized financial blueprint.

Learn More

401(k) & IRA Rollovers

Strategic rollover guidance to maximize your retirement savings.

Learn More

Social Security Optimization

Maximize your Social Security benefits with strategic claiming strategies.

Learn More

Medicare & IRMAA Planning

Navigate Medicare options and minimize IRMAA surcharges.

Learn More

Estate & Legacy Planning

Protect and transfer your wealth to future generations efficiently.

Learn More

Federal Employee Benefits

Specialized planning for federal employees and their unique benefits.

Learn More

Our Comprehensive Planning Process

1

Discovery & Analysis

We gather all your financial information and analyze your current situation, goals, and risk tolerance.

2

Strategy Development

Create a personalized retirement plan with tax-efficient strategies and income optimization.

3

Implementation

Execute your plan with proper account structures, investments, and legal documentation.

4

Ongoing Management

Regular reviews and adjustments to keep your plan optimized as laws and life circumstances change.

Service Categories

Income Planning

Strategies to create reliable retirement income streams that last throughout your retirement.

  • Tax-efficient withdrawal strategies
  • Social Security optimization
  • Pension maximization
  • Annuity analysis
  • Roth conversion strategies
Explore Income Planning

Investment Management

Professional portfolio management aligned with your retirement timeline and risk tolerance.

  • Asset allocation strategies
  • Risk management
  • Tax-loss harvesting
  • Rebalancing
  • Performance monitoring
Learn About Management

Protection Planning

Safeguard your wealth and ensure your legacy is protected for future generations.

  • Estate planning coordination
  • Trust strategies
  • Insurance analysis
  • Medicare planning
  • Long-term care planning
Protect Your Legacy

Employee Benefits

FERS, TSP, and Federal Benefits Planning

Specialized strategies for federal employees including FERS optimization, TSP management, FEGLI analysis, and coordination with other federal benefits.

Retirement Money Map

Our signature planning tool that creates a visual roadmap of your financial future, showing exactly how your money will work throughout retirement.

Who We Serve

Retired or Close To It

You're approaching retirement or already retired and need strategic income planning to make your savings last.

Learn More

Diligent Savers ($500K+)

You've built substantial savings and need professional guidance to optimize your retirement strategy.

Learn More

Tax-Conscious Planners

You understand the impact of taxes on retirement and want strategies to minimize your tax burden.

Learn More

Minimum Investment Requirement

We work with families who have saved $500,000 or more for retirement. This allows us to provide the comprehensive planning and personal attention our clients deserve.

$500K Minimum Assets

Our Service Commitments

✓

Fiduciary Standard

We are legally obligated to act in your best interest at all times. No conflicts, no commissions, just honest advice.

✓

Transparent Fees

Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden fees or surprise charges. You'll always know what you're paying and why.

✓

Ongoing Education

We believe informed clients make better decisions. Expect regular education and clear explanations of all strategies.

✓

Proactive Communication

Regular updates on your plan's progress and proactive communication about changes that might affect your strategy.

Getting Started is Simple

1

Schedule Consultation

Call 801.210.2800 or use our online form to schedule your complimentary initial consultation.

2

Meet & Discover

We'll discuss your goals, review your current situation, and explore how we can help optimize your retirement plan.

3

Begin Planning

If we're a good fit, we'll start creating your personalized retirement strategy using our comprehensive planning process.

Ready to optimize your retirement strategy?
